setup: 1. Import this file into n8n: Workflows → Import from file
SOC_AGENT_HOST     IP of machine running 'python main.py serve' (default: localhost)
SERPER_API_KEY     (optional) get from serper.dev for RSS fallback
3. Start the agent webhook: python main.py serve
